extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: I counted only the “Against” rows—criminal proceedings of Nil against the Company, 0 against Directors, Nil against Promoters and Nil against Subsidiaries; statutory/regulatory actions of 2 against the Company and Nil against the other listed entities; and tax proceedings of 46 against the Company plus 3 against Subsidiaries, excluding the Promoters’ and Directors’ personal tax matters. I excluded all “By our Company,” “By our Directors,” “By our Promoters,” and “By our Subsidiary” rows. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is ₹107.75 million plus ₹0.25 million, or ₹108.00 million, converted to ₹10.80 crore; the contingent-liabilities figure uses the stated Total of ₹55.20 million as of June 30, 2022, converted to ₹5.52 crore. The company-wide top-10 customer concentration is 70.42% for Fiscal 2022, measured against revenue from operations; segment-level top-10 percentages were not used, and no company-wide top-five percentage is disclosed. Monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
